headline: Woman's 'Healing Era' Is Just Her Watching Sad Movies On Purpose And Calling It 'Therapy'
summary: 'I'm processing emotions,' Amanda said. 'You're watching The Notebook again,' her friend said. 'It's working,' Amanda said.
fullBody: Amanda HealingMovies has watched The Notebook 47 times. 'I'm accessing my feelings,' Amanda said. 'You're accessing the same feelings,' her friend said. 'Each viewing is different,' Amanda said. It wasn't. Her therapist suggested 'maybe a comedy.' Amanda said 'that's not healing.' She has started a 'sad movie marathon.' The marathon is in its 14th week. 'I think I'm healing,' Amanda said. 'I think you're sad,' her friend said.
